Name: Convert Intake Into CRM
Steps: Intake Register row -> Organization -> Contact -> Engagement -> Touchpoint -> Lifecycle Checklist -> Planner task if action-bearing -> Agent Action Log evidence -> Decision Register only for scope/governance/commercial decisions

Name: Onboarding
Steps: Set EngagementStage to Onboarding -> Select EntryPackage and TargetPackage -> Create Lifecycle Checklist items -> Assign owner and due dates -> Add evidence links -> Move to Active Delivery only when blockers clear

Name: Offboarding
Steps: Confirm PlannedOfframpPackage -> Complete OffboardingRequirements -> Link Handoff Packet Register if applicable -> Record access/review decision if needed -> Move EngagementStage to Offboarding -> Archive as Alumni / Archived after evidence and next-review date
